title: Jalen Duren To Meet With Kings To Seek Sign-And-Trade
summary: The Pistons and Jalen Duren remain far apart in their contract negotiations. We first heard on.

title: Bucks’ Prince Opts In; Trent To Become Free Agent
summary: Bucks forward Taurean Prince has picked up his $3,815,861 option for next season, reports Eric Nehm of The Athletic.

title: Celtics Exercise 2026/27 Options On Queta, Walsh, Banton
summary: The Celtics have finalized their five team option decisions for the 2026/27 season.

title: Spurs Sign Julian Champagnie To Three-Year Extension
summary: Champagnie’s extension is now official, the Spurs announced in a press release.

title: Landry Shamet, Knicks agree to 4-year deal
summary: The sharp-shooting reserve guard returns to New York on a 4-year deal after helping the Knicks capture the 2026 NBA title.

title: Jazz, Jusuf Nurkic Agree To Two-Year Deal
summary: Free agent center Jusuf Nurkic will be returning to the Jazz.

title: Clippers Exercise Brook Lopez’s Option, Pass On Bogdanovic, Batum
summary: The Clippers have finalized decisions on their three remaining team options ahead of Monday’s deadline.

title: Thunder Pick Up Lu Dort’s Option, Make Kenrich Williams UFA
summary: The Thunder have finalized decisions on their remaining team options, picking up Luguentz Dort‘s $17.7MM option for 2026/27.

title: Hawks To Make Jonathan Kuminga Free Agent
summary: The Hawks won’t exercise their $24.3MM team option on Jonathan Kuminga for the 2026/27 season, reports NBA insider Chris Haynes .

title: Bucks Declining Andre Jackson’s Team Option
summary: The Bucks won’t pick up their team option for the 2026/27 season on guard Andre Jackson Jr.

title: Suns Exercising 2026/27 Option On Jamaree Bouyea
summary: The Suns are exercising their $2.58MM team option on Jamaree Bouyea for the 2026/27 season, reports Michael Scotto of HoopsHype .

title: Anthony Davis Free-Agent Market Heats Up
summary: Word of the Warriors‘ apparent interest in Wizards big man Anthony Davis first surfaced night and was advanced when Draymond Green declined his $27.7MM p...

title: Hawks add Devin Carter in trade with Kings
summary: The 24-year-old guard reportedly is headed to Atlanta in a trade with Sacramento.

title: Pistons Pick Up Contract Options On Daniss Jenkins, Tolu Smith
summary: The Pistons have picked up their team options on the 2026/27 contracts of guard Daniss Jenkins and big man Tolu Smith, Spotrac’s Keith Smith tweets.

title: Andrew Wiggins, Heat agree to extension
summary: Miami keeps its swingman as Andrew Wiggins reportedly opts in for 2026-27 and then gets a 2-year extension.

title: Miles Bridges-to-Suns Trade Brings Back Grayson Allen
summary: Hornets reportedly deal Miles Bridges and picks to Suns for Grayson Allen, Royce O'Neale and a future first round pick.

title: Celtics re-sign Ron Harper Jr. to long-term extension
summary: Former Two-Way guard Ron Harper Jr. reportedly signs three-year extension to remain with Celtics.
